title: Among Us Beds
description: Adds an Among Us texture to each bed
body:
![Title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6945f0619263776392f38ebd59e847aa398dfc8a.png)
This resourcepack changes the texture of beds. it adds an Amoung Us character depending on the color of the bed on the bed itself. This beds are kinda SUS!
